creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
James E. Flemer, 17.05.10, 17:10h CEST:

> From: "James E. Flemer" <jflemer@alum.rpi.edu>
> To: GNATS <FreeBSD-gnats-submit@freebsd.org>
> Cc:  
> Subject: Re: ports/140303: net-mgmt/docsis can not compile filters under amd64 
> 	platform
> Date: Mon, 17 May 2010 08:41:10 -0600
> 
>  The upstream project for this port has been stalled since 2006, and does not
>  support amd64.  There is a user contributed patch set on the SF.net
>  tracker[1] for amd64.
>  
>  [1]
>  http://sourceforge.net/tracker/?func=detail&aid=2779880&group_id=22615&atid=375631
>  
>  (Parts of) the above patch should be adapted for/tested on fbsd/amd64.  I'm
>  not able to do that right now though.

OK, thanks for your feedback! I'll add NOT_FOR_ARCHS=amd64 to the port's
Makefile for now, then, until the patch is adapted.

Regards,
Stefan
